deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput && python -c "import os, django; os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'attendance_system.settings'); django.setup(); from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; User = get_user_model(); User.objects.filter(username='admin').exists() or User.objects.create_superuser('admin', 'admin@mmu.ac.ke', 'mmu_password123')" && python manage.py runscript seed_uni_units && python manage.py runscript seed_uni_data && gunicorn attendance_system.wsgi
